hero.desc: Hi, I'm Meryem Sıla. I'm a full-stack developer. If you're looking for a developer who crafts solid and scalable products with great user experiences, let's shake hands.

profile.title: Profile
profile.about: I enjoy building accessible, fast and clean interfaces. I care about UI details, consistent spacing and readable code.

items.title: Workintech
